description: Off-thread baseline compilation of self-hosted scripts did not null the realm pointer (JSNullableAutoRealm only works on-thread via the JSContext). When experimental.self_hosted_cache is enabled, repeated generator-function constructor calls under JIT off-thread compilation hit `!masm.maybeRealm()` in BaselineCodeGen.h:153 — the wrong-realm check that should detect missing GC pre-barriers, letting the GC lose track of objects (UAF risk). sec-high csectype-uaf. Fix: do not off-thread compile realm-independent self-hosted baseline code (git 3905f930df89, iireland@mozilla.com).
